title: Probe holder system
abstract: Probe holder system for holding at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit comprising at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit including a scanning surface arranged to examine an object along a scanning direction; a probe holder frame to which said at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit is mountable; at least one spring assembly attached to said probe holder frame and configured to push said at least one testing probe unit towards said object to be examined.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Probe holder system for holding at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit comprising - at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit including a scanning surface arranged to examine an object along a scanning direction; - a probe holder frame to which said at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit is mountable; - at least one spring assembly attached to said probe holder frame and configured to push said at least one testing probe unit towards said object to be examined; characterized in that said at least one spring assembly comprises a first spring element, a second spring element, and a connecting element connecting said first spring element and said second spring element and arranged to keep said first spring element and said second spring element spaced-apart, wherein said connecting element is pivotally attached to said ultrasonic testing probe unit. 2. Probe holder system according to claim 1, wherein said first spring element and said second spring element are fixedly attached to said probe holder frame. 3. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said ultrasonic testing probe unit is pivotally attached to a middle point of said connecting element. 4. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said connecting element is arranged to be movable towards and away from said scanning surface. 5. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said connecting element is arranged substantially perpendicularly to said scanning direction. 6. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said first spring element and said second spring element are arranged substantially perpendicularly to said scanning direction. 7. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said first spring element, said second spring element and said connecting element are arranged in a plane that is transverse to said scanning direction. 8. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said connecting element is arranged substantially perpendicularly to said scanning surface. 9. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said connecting element is arranged to be inflexible. 10. Probe holder system according to claim 9, further comprising a blocking element configured to prevent the connecting element from bending. 11. Probe holder system according to claim 10, wherein said blocking element is rotatably mountable in the at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit. 12. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said first spring element, said second spring element and said connecting element are a single piece. 13. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said spring assembly comprises a leaf spring. 14. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said first spring element, said second spring element and said connecting element form a single-piece leaf spring. 15. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said spring assembly comprises a wire spring. 16. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said first spring element, said second spring element and said connecting element form a single-piece wire spring. 17. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit includes a plurality of transducer elements configured to transmit and receive ultrasonic waves. 18. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit includes a wedge including said scanning surface configured to engage a surface of said object to be examined. 19. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said probe holder frame is substantially U-shaped. 20. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, comprising at least two spring assemblies arranged on either side of the at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit in said scanning direction. 21. Probe holder system according to claim 20, wherein the connecting elements of the at least two spring assemblies are pivotably attached to said ultrasonic testing probe unit by a single pivot. 22. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims, comprising at least two ultrasonic testing probe units arranged to examine a same object, each testing probe unit comprising a wedge including said scanning surface configured to engage a surface of said object to be examined. 23. Probe holder system according to claim 22, wherein said at least two ultrasonic testing probe units are spaced apart in a direction transverse to the scanning direction. 24. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims 22- 23, wherein a distance between said at least two ultrasonic testing probe units is adjustable in a direction transverse to the scanning direction. 25. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims 22- 24, comprising at least two probe holder frames, wherein each probe holder frame is provided with at least one spring assembly to which at least one ultrasonic testing probe unit is attached. 26. Probe holder system according to claim 25, wherein the connecting element of each of the at least two spring assemblies are oriented in substantially a same direction. 27. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims 25- 26, wherein said at least two probe holder frames are substantially U- shaped, wherein a pair of legs of one of said probe holder frames is oriented towards a pair of legs of another of said probe holder frames. 28. Probe holder system according to claim 27, wherein said at least two probe holder frames are positioned in a staggered way in the scanning direction. 29. Probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims 27- 28, wherein the ultrasonic testing probe unit is positioned asymmetrically in the scanning direction between the legs of the probe holder frame. 30. Probe holder system according to any preceding claims, wherein the at least one spring assembly is arranged to keep said first spring element and said second spring element spaced-apart in a direction which is substantially perpendicularly to said scanning surface. 31. Scanning system for examination of pipehne welds, in particular longitudinal welds, comprising - a frame preferably following a pipeline's curvature; - a positioning device mountable to said frame; - an ultrasonic scanning device mountable to said frame in parallel with a weld to be examined; - a probe holder system according to any of the preceding claims 1-30, mountable to said frame and connectable to said ultrasonic scanning device. 32. Scanning system according to claim 31, wherein said probe holder system comprises two substantially U-shaped probe holder frames, in each 

 of which an ultrasonic testing probe unit is mounted asymmetrically in between legs of said probe holder frame, wherein two spring assemblies are mounted to each of said two probe holder frames on either side of said ultrasonic testing probe unit. 33. Scanning system according to claim 32, wherein said two probe holder frames are positioned in a staggered way.
